testcase.name: test_login

failure.message:
AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chunked_upload.py:46: in test_login assert r.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_pack_for_upload
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chunked_upload.py:60: in test_create_pack_for_upload assert headers, "No auth token" E AssertionError: No auth token E assert {}

testcase.name: test_chunk_endpoint_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 assert 502 in [401, 403] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chunked_upload.py:86: in test_chunk_endpoint_requires_auth assert r.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 E assert 502 in [401, 403] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_finalize_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 assert 502 in [401, 403] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chunked_upload.py:159: in test_finalize_requires_auth assert r.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 502 E assert 502 in [401, 403] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
